Description: Date the customer record was captured or entered into the dataset. Customer attributes may change daily.
Unique customer mobile number identifier.
Customer’s first and middle names.
Customer’s surname or last name.
Customer’s age in years.
Indicates whether the customer is a tertiary student or not.
Current status/state of the customer’s SIM card.
Previous SIM state before transitioning to the current state.
Customer’s airtime balance.
Date the customer SIM/account was activated on the network.
Number of days the customer has been active on the network since activation.
Customer’s home cell name.
Type of network cell serving the customer (e.g., 2G, 3G, 4G, LTE).
Name of the network site where the customer’s home cell is located.
Administrative region associated with the customer.
District associated with the customer.
Commercial zone classification used for reporting and analysis.
Territory classification under the zone structure.
Customer segment classification (e.g., Consumer or Enterprise).
Manufacturer/brand of the customer’s handset device.
Model name of the customer’s handset device.
Operating system running on the customer’s handset.
Network capability category of the handset (e.g., 2G, 3G, LTE, 5G supported device).
Indicates whether the customer device is a smartphone (Yes/No/Any). “Any” is treated as non-smartphone.
Indicates whether the customer was attached/connected to the network on the record date.
Total revenue generated from bundle purchases.
Revenue generated from voice bundles.
Revenue generated from data bundles.
Revenue generated from integrated bundles containing both voice and data.
Revenue generated from SMS bundles.
Revenue generated from third-party Value Added Services (VAS).
Revenue generated from MT VAS channels/services.
Revenue generated from SMS VAS services.
Revenue generated from Caller Ring Back Tone (CRBT) services.
Pay-as-you-go voice revenue charged directly from airtime balance.
Pay-as-you-go data/browsing revenue charged directly from airtime balance.
Total Value Added Services (VAS) revenue, including Third Party, MT, SMS, and CRBT revenues.
Total revenue generated from the customer across all revenue streams.
